query:
Research the company "ghirardelli".

Research the company's recent financial performance, specifically looking for: (1) Quarterly or annual P&L misses or guidance withdrawals in the past 6-12 months, (2) Revenue/production growth rates and whether they're decoupling from profitability, (3) Recent CEO changes or new CEO within last 12-18 months, (4) Current strategic review, transformation, or restructuring initiatives, (5) Product launch activity, especially platform or midsize launches, (6) Operational challenges across functions: production capacity bottlenecks, pricing changes, distribution expansion, or demand forecasting issues, (7) Margin compression trends despite functional-level wins, (8) Company scale (Fortune 500, $10B+, midsize), (9) Industry segment (automotive, consumer goods, manufacturing, retail, etc.), (10) Cross-functional organizational structure and siloed metrics by function.

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
**Executive Summary**

Ghirardelli, operating within the premium chocolate, specialty retail, and baking segments, is currently executing a strategic growth roadmap to reach $1 billion in revenue by 2027. While the brand achieved 3.8% sales growth in 2025 and its parent company’s North America segment beat margin expectations, the broader organization is facing significant operational headwinds. Unprecedented cocoa costs forced a 19% group-wide price increase, which successfully protected margins but resulted in lower industry sales volumes and a 30% drop in free cash flow. Despite these macro-level supply chain and pricing challenges, Ghirardelli has maintained an aggressive product innovation pipeline in the first half of 2026, expanding into new categories such as refrigerated cookie dough and capitalizing on viral social media trends.

**Financial Performance and Scale**

Ghirardelli operates as a major brand within the North American portfolio of its parent company, Lindt & Sprüngli. The company is currently categorized as a midsize-to-large enterprise with a stated strategic target to reach $1 billion in revenue by 2027 [Ghirardelli announces senior sales manager GTR appointment](https://www.dfnionline.com/brand-news/ghirardelli-announces-senior-sales-manager-gtr-appointment-28-10-2024/). 

*   **Revenue Growth:** In 2025, Ghirardelli brand sales increased by 3.8% at constant exchange rates [Chocoladefabriken Lindt & Sprüngli AG stock (CH0010570759): Swiss chocolate maker reports solid gro](https://www.ad-hoc-news.de/boerse/news/ueberblick/chocoladefabriken-lindt-and-spruengli-ag-stock-ch0010570759-swiss/69296615). The broader North America region achieved organic sales growth of 8.9%, reaching CHF 2.18 billion, with growth accelerating to 11.9% in the second half of the year [Lindt & Sprüngli delivers strong organic growth in a volatile environment (Media Release: Sales Results 2025)](https://www.lindt-spruengli.com/amfile/file/download/id/10287/file/Lindt-Spruengli-Media-Release-Sales-2025-EN.pdf). By contrast, sister brand Russell Stover saw a 6.2% sales decline [Lindt shares down 6% on 2025 results day as 2026 guidance disappoints By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/lindt-2025-sales-hit-record-chf-592-bln-but-volume-falls-as-prices-surge-4551109).
*   **Profitability and Margins:** The North America region reported a 2025 EBIT margin of 13.7%, beating the consensus estimate of 12.4% [Lindt shares down 6% on 2025 results day as 2026 guidance disappoints By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/lindt-2025-sales-hit-record-chf-592-bln-but-volume-falls-as-prices-surge-4551109). Looking ahead, Lindt & Sprüngli expects a group-wide operating profit margin improvement of 20–40 basis points for 2026 [Lindt & Sprüngli achieves 12.4% Organic Growth and Higher Profitability - ACROSS](https://www.across-magazine.com/lindt-sprungli-financial-results-2025/).
*   **Guidance Withdrawals and Misses:** Citing geopolitical uncertainties, Lindt & Sprüngli slashed its 2026 organic growth outlook to 4–6%, a downgrade from its longstanding strategic target of 6–8% [Lindt & Sprüngli achieves double-digit organic growth and higher profitability](https://www.lindt-spruengli.com/press-releases-and-news/english/lindt-sprungli-achieves-double-digit-organic-growth-and-higher-profitability-in-2025/). Additionally, the group's "Rest of the World" segment missed its margin target, posting 10.0% against a 14.9% consensus [Lindt shares down 6% on 2025 results day as 2026 guidance disappoints By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/lindt-2025-sales-hit-record-chf-592-bln-but-volume-falls-as-prices-surge-4551109).

**Operational Challenges and Margin Pressures**

Ghirardelli and its parent company have faced significant operational and supply chain bottlenecks over the past year, leading to a decoupling of revenue growth from sales volume:
*   **Pricing and Volume Decoupling:** To offset unprecedented high cocoa costs, Lindt & Sprüngli implemented group-wide price increases of 19% in 2025. While this protected revenue and margins, it directly resulted in lower sales volumes across the industry [Lindt & Sprüngli delivers strong organic growth in a volatile environment (Media Release: Sales Results 2025)](https://www.lindt-spruengli.com/amfile/file/download/id/10287/file/Lindt-Spruengli-Media-Release-Sales-2025-EN.pdf).
*   **Cash Flow Compression:** Despite functional-level margin wins in North America, group-wide free cash flow dropped 30% in 2025 (from CHF 635 million to CHF 446.3 million). This compression was driven by higher inventory valuations caused by the surging cocoa costs [Lindt shares down 6% on 2025 results day as 2026 guidance disappoints By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/lindt-2025-sales-hit-record-chf-592-bln-but-volume-falls-as-prices-surge-4551109).
*   **Distribution Bottlenecks:** The company recently resolved a major historical supply chain failure. Lindt & Sprüngli was awarded $33 million in a federal trial against GXO (formerly XPO Logistics) over a failed warehouse consolidation project that previously caused Ghirardelli to lose millions in sales due to an inability to stock retail shelves [Russell Stover Candies owner Lindt wins $33 million verdict](https://www.kansascity.com/news/business/article287609130.html).

**Strategic Transformation and Restructuring**

To support its $1 billion revenue target, Ghirardelli is executing several strategic transformations across digital, retail, and supply chain functions:
*   **Digital Transformation:** The company is centralizing product content and streamlining its e-commerce strategy across major retailers (Walmart, Amazon, Target, Kroger) by implementing the Salsify Product Experience Management (PXM) platform [Ghirardelli Strengthens Its Ecommerce Retailer Strategy With Salsify](https://www.salsify.com/resources/case-study/ghirardelli).
*   **Global Expansion:** Ghirardelli appointed Mohammed Aldahabi as Senior Sales Manager, Global Travel Retail, to lead expansion exclusively outside the US market [Ghirardelli appoints GTR expansion lead as part of $1bn revenue push](https://www.trbusiness.com/regional-news/international/ghirardelli-appoints-gtr-expansion-lead-as-part-of-1bn-revenue-push/259231). The brand debuted at the TFWA Asia Pacific Exhibition in May 2025 to outline its APAC growth strategy [TFWA Asia Pacific Preview: Ghirardelli aims for APAC expansion with TFWA Singapore debut](https://www.dfnionline.com/brand-news/tfwa-asia-pacific-preview-ghirardelli-aims-for-apac-expansion-with-tfwa-singapore-debut-07-05-2025/).
*   **Supply Chain Sustainability:** Ghirardelli partnered with Cargill to enhance its cocoa supply chain and improve production sustainability [Premium Chocolate Market Size & Opportunities, 2025-2032](https://www.coherentmarketinsights.com/industry-reports/premium-chocolate-market).
*   **Real Estate and Production:** On April 27, 2026, Embrace Real Estate acquired Ghirardelli Square from Jamestown [Embrace Real Estate Acquires Ghirardelli Square from Jamestown](https://www.themiddlemarket.com/latest-news/embrace-real-estate-acquires-ghirardelli-square-from-jamestown). Operationally, Lindt & Sprüngli expanded its Stratham, NH headquarters by 100,000 square feet to add Ghirardelli production lines [Business Report: Lindt Expands To Add Ghirardelli Line In Stratham, NH](https://businessfacilities.com/lindt-expands-to-add-ghirardelli-line-in-stratham-nh/).

**Recent Product Launches and Retail Expansion**

Ghirardelli has maintained an aggressive product launch cadence over the last 6 months (January–June 2026), expanding into new categories and leveraging viral trends:
*   **June 11, 2026:** Launched the limited-time soccer-inspired "Waffle GOOOOAL Sundae" [Ghirardelli® Scores Big This Summer with New Limited-Time Waffle GOOOOAL Sundae](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-scores-big-this-summer-with-new-limited-time-waffle-gooooal-sundae-302795868.html).
*   **June 9, 2026:** Entered a new category with its first-ever line of premium refrigerated cookie dough in Classic Chocolate Chip and Chocolate Chip Brownie flavors [/C O R R E C T I O N — Ghirardelli/ | Morningstar](https://www.morningstar.com/news/pr-newswire/20260609sf79049/c-o-r-r-e-c-t-i-o-n-ghirardelli).
*   **May 13, 2026:** Released the "Dubai Style Chocolate Strawberry Bliss," expanding on its highly successful late-2025 Dubai Style product line [Ghirardelli® Introduces Dubai Style Chocolate Strawberry Bliss, a Fresh Addition to Its Dubai Collection](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-introduces-dubai-style-chocolate-strawberry-bliss-a-fresh-addition-to-its-dubai-collection-302770417.html).
*   **April 2026:** Introduced "Sea Salt Caramel Cookie Squares" [Ghirardelli Just Dropped a Brand-New Chocolate—and Fans Say It's an 'Immediate Must-Have'](https://www.allrecipes.com/ghirardelli-sea-salt-caramel-cookie-squares-11959909).
*   **March 31, 2026:** Launched its first "Milk Chocolate Chip Brownie Mix" [Ghirardelli® Sweetens The Baking Aisle For Milk Chocolate Fans with All-New Milk Chocolate Chip Brownie Mix](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-sweetens-the-baking-aisle-for-milk-chocolate-fans-with-all-new-milk-chocolate-chip-brownie-mix-302729214.html).
*   **Q1 2026 Seasonal:** Launched "Milk Chocolate Cookie Bunnies" for Easter [Ghirardelli® Elevates Easter with a New Seasonal Flavor and the Return of Its Beloved Chocolate Bunny](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-elevates-easter-with-a-new-seasonal-flavor-and-the-return-of-its-beloved-chocolate-bunny-302710339.html) and the "Sweetheart Collection Heart Gift Box" for Valentine's Day, alongside a brand partnership with McBride Sisters Collection wine [Ghirardelli's Brand-New Release Is an Elegant Valentine's Day Idea - Parade](https://parade.com/food/ghirardelli-brand-new-release-is-an-elegant-valentines-day-idea); [Ghirardelli Chocolate Company & McBride Sisters Collection Celebrate Valentine's Day with a unique Brand Partnership](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-chocolate-company--mcbride-sisters-collection-celebrate-valentines-day-with-a-unique-brand-partnership-302654316.html).
*   **Retail Expansion:** Opened a new storefront in Santa Barbara on January 22, 2026 [Ghirardelli Unveils New Santa Barbara Shop Bringing Sweetness to the California Coast](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ghirardelli-unveils-new-santa-barbara-shop-bringing-sweetness-to-the-california-coast-302645354.html), bringing its US retail presence to 40,000 points of sale [Chocoladefabriken Lindt & Sprüngli AG stock (CH0010570759): Premium chocolate leader navigates glob](https://www.ad-hoc-news.de/boerse/news/ueberblick/chocoladefabriken-lindt-and-spruengli-ag-stock-ch0010570759-premium/69328530).

**Gaps and Limitations**
Based on the provided research findings, the following requested information could not be verified:
*   **CEO Changes:** No information was provided regarding recent CEO changes or a new CEO within the last 12-18 months.
*   **Organizational Structure:** No data was available regarding Ghirardelli's internal cross-functional organizational structure or specific siloed metrics by function.
*   **Demand Forecasting Issues:** While distribution bottlenecks and pricing impacts were noted, specific internal demand forecasting issues were not detailed in the provided text.
